arts.ttl: Derek Adams boasts astonishing transfer record but must work miracles at Morecambe again
arts.sum: Morecambe are rock-bottom of League Two heading into a crucial match against fellow relegation strugglers Swindon, but manager Derek Adams has seen it all before

Swindon 2-2 draw with Accrington last weekend made it just one defeat in their last five games. Morecambe's 1-0 defeat to Port Vale on Saturday was their fifth defeat in their last seven games. More...
